summary: performance issue: Sudden transition to loading screen, Error message pop-up: 'The connection to the server has timed out.', Return to the main menu. during The player was moving the party across a bridge area in the monastery immediately after a quest update.
game_context: The player was moving the party across a bridge area in the monastery immediately after a quest update.
evidence: Error message pop-up: 'The connection to the server has timed out.'
Scene: Exploring the upper reaches of Rosymorn Monastery after looting the Dawnmaster's Crest.
Quote: Ah, that would do it, yeah.

summary: ui rendering issue: Version mismatch for 'FaerunColors' and 'Fate Series Archer' mods, Mandatory update progress bar during Re-synchronizing game state and mods to rejoin a multiplayer session.
game_context: Re-synchronizing game state and mods to rejoin a multiplayer session.
evidence: Version mismatch for 'FaerunColors' and 'Fate Series Archer' mods
Scene: Mod Verification screen after attempting to rejoin the lobby.
Quote: Fucking dammit. Fate does take a little bit to get itself sorted.

summary: other issue: A Windows OS 'busy' cursor appears, System error dialogue box pops up over the game UI during Attempting to run an 'Update' on an installed mod while the game is running.
game_context: Attempting to run an 'Update' on an installed mod while the game is running.
evidence: System error dialogue box pops up over the game UI
Scene: In-game Mod Manager updating 'Fate Series Archer' mod.
Quote: The process cannot access the file because it is being used by another process.
Quote: Oh please say it's not doing this shit again.

summary: other issue: Error pop-up message: 'Failed to join: installed mods do not match the session's mods you're trying to join.' during Joining a multiplayer session where mod versions are out of sync.
game_context: Joining a multiplayer session where mod versions are out of sync.
evidence: Error pop-up message: 'Failed to join: installed mods do not match the session's mods you're trying to join.'
Scene: Loading screen after attempting to join a multiplayer lobby.
Quote: Failed to join... installed mods do not match the session's mods.
Quote: I'm gonna go back to my files.
